title: Ilumina DNA Prep Part 2 - Post Tagmentation Cleanup
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples for this run. * `Index start column`: Specify which column to start aspirating from on the index plate. * `P300 tip start column on slot 11 (1-12)`: The number of columns of tips used on slot 11 is equal to the number of columns of samples. Slot 11 tip rack is used for tip parking on the two ethanol washes to save tips. Specify which column to start picking tips up from. * `Length from side`: Specify the length from the side of the well to aspirate from magnetically engaged beads. A value of 1 would be 1mm from the side of the well opposite beads. A value of 2.73 means the exact center of the well. This distance is also used when re-suspending beads, and mixing at bead location. * `Aspiration height`: Specify how many millimeters from the bottom of the well to aspirate from at the `Length from side` distance specified above. * `P20 Multi-Channel GEN2 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) the P20 multi channel pipette is mounted. * `P300 Multi Channel GEN2 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) the P300 multi channel pipette is mounted.

steps.title: Transferring 5ul of TSB from mastermix...
steps.instruction: Transferring 5ul of TSB from mastermix plate to sample plate, slowly mix, new tips

steps.title: Sample plate is being place on magnetic module
steps.instruction: Sample plate is being place on magnetic module

steps.title: Add 50ul of twb over beads,...
steps.instruction: Add 50ul of twb over beads, mix 15 times at bead location (resuspend)

steps.title: Repeat (5-9) 2 times, remove 50ul...
steps.instruction: Repeat (5-9) 2 times, remove 50ul instead of 30 for 2nd and 3rd iteration

steps.title: Add 50ul of twb over beads,...
steps.instruction: Add 50ul of twb over beads, mix 15 times at bead location (resuspend)

steps.title: User will put EPM mastermix into...
steps.instruction: User will put EPM mastermix into columns 3 and 4 of bio rad plate

steps.title: Add 20ul of EPM, mix 15...
steps.instruction: Add 20ul of EPM, mix 15 times at bead location (resuspend)

steps.title: Transfer 5ul of index to sample, mix 10 times
steps.instruction: Transfer 5ul of index to sample, mix 10 times
